title: Dummy Plug Backwards
wikitext:
[]: Dummy Plug Backwards             Quote Post by BeoX2 » Thu Jul 29, 2010 11:38 pm I recently found this while exploring. When played backwards, the dummy system starting up says "Freedom is an illusion. All you lose is the emotion of pride. To be dominated by me is not as bad for humankind as to be dominated by others of your species." Creepy. http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5sqEzIHyYPk
